ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this setting belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color used in the experiment (e.g., orange, blue) */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image file used in the experiment */,
  "video" TEXT /* Video file used in the experiment */,
  "show_cross" INTEGER /* Whether a cross symbol is shown in the experiment */,
  "percentage_blue" INTEGER /* Percentage of blue color in the experiment */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus used in the experiment (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stimulus in milliseconds */,
  "response_time_limit" INTEGER /* Time limit for the participant's response in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant (e.g., high school, college, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this response belongs to */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting used in this response */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant in milliseconds */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the participant's response (0 or 1) */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the participant's response (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response made by the participant (e.g., correct, incorrect, unsure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES experiment_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the experiment designer */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the experiment designer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the experiment designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_designer_experiments" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment designer */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the experiment designer in the experiment (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, experiment designer, participant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_data" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this data belongs to */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting used in this data */,
  "catch_trial" INTEGER /* Whether this is a catch trial */,
  "modal" TEXT /* Modal value used in this data */,
  "catch_trial_answer_correct" INTEGER /* Whether the worker's answer is correct for the catch trial */,
  "worker_type" TEXT /* Type of worker (e.g., human, AI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_data_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES experiment_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_worker_data" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker data */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the worker's completion (e.g., completed, incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research question */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the research question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_questions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypotheses" (
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hypothesis */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research question this hypothesis belongs to */,
  "hypothesis_text" TEXT /* Text of the hypothesis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hypothesis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypotheses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES research_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this result belongs to */,
  "result_text" TEXT /* Text of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
